entry.title: New: RES25-106 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO REQUEST ADDITIONAL FUNDS FOR CONTRACT NO. SC-COR-2200087 FOR SERVICES OF KOBAYASHI SUGITA & GODA LLP AS SPECIAL COUNSEL REPRESENTING DEFENDANTS HONOLULU LIQUOR COMMISSION, JACOB FEARS, AND CATHERINE FONTAINE IN THE LEGAL ACTION ENTITLTED SCARLET HONOLULU, INC., ET AL. V. HONOLULU LIQUOR COMMISSION. ET AL., CASE NO. CV 21-00457 KJM (USDC).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
